title: Reproducibility archive for a MASLD fibrosis mechanostress/stromal transcriptomic program

creators.name: Ye, Chengqian
creators.affiliation: The Affiliated People's Hospital of Fujian University of Traditional Chinese Medicine

description: This archive contains the locked 97-gene program, benchmark and proxy gene sets, processed result tables, figure source data, analysis scripts, and environment files supporting a public-dataset bioinformatics study of a mechanostress/stromal transcriptomic program in MASLD-associated liver fibrosis. Raw public sequencing data and large single-cell objects are not redistributed and should be obtained from the original repositories.
